title: M19 Corporate Actions And Workbench Alert Visibility

items.title: Corporate action sidecar exists in DuckDB
items.description: DuckDB includes corporate_action_item and the default development seed writes deterministic enterprise-action rows for the fixture-backed workbench.

items.title: Stock corporate-actions API is exposed
items.description: Backend exposes GET /api/v1/stocks/{symbol}/corporate-actions and stock snapshot available_series now includes corporate_action.

items.title: Live Tushare sync writes corporate actions
items.description: The isolated Tushare live sync writes non-zero corporate_action_item rows and marks the artifact READY for the current tracked universe.

items.title: Workbench surfaces recent alerts
items.description: Frontend workbench reads /api/v1/system/alerts and shows recent runtime alerts together with stock corporate action details.
